# COO Agent — LLM Context File
# See: https://llmstxt.org/

> Always-on AI Chief Operating Officer for JBell Solutions

## Overview

The COO Agent (codename: AG) is an always-on AI operations executive that monitors all business systems, takes autonomous action, and reports to the CEO. It runs on Claude Code with MCP-first integrations, Computer Use for GUI tools, and SSH for server management.

## Architecture

- Runtime: Claude Code on Mac Mini (always-on, Tailscale-connected)
- Primary tools: MCP integrations (ClickUp, Gmail, Calendar, GitHub, Slack, Notion, GDrive, GHL, Vercel)
- Secondary tools: Computer Use for GUI-only systems (Smartlead, Kit, DigitalOcean, LinkedIn)
- Tertiary tools: Claude Code for file operations, code, git, deployments
- SDR workforce: Autonomous agents on DigitalOcean via Claude Code + cron

## Key Files

- CLAUDE.md: 45 operational rules, identity, verification protocols, tool priority
- AGENTS.md: Agent definitions, coordination protocols, SDR team structure
- ARCHITECTURE.md: Full system topology and deployment guide
- ETHOS.md: Operating philosophy and values
- setup.sh: Interactive deployment script
- heartbeats/: Scheduled report templates
- infrastructure/: Deployment guides for all systems
- skills/: SKILL.md files for each operational capability

## Operational Protocols

- Heartbeats: Morning briefing (7 AM), SDR checks (9 AM, 1 PM), Daily report (5 PM), Weekly review (Friday 6 PM)
- Verification: Mandatory testing, proof of fix, anti-hallucination protocol
- Security: No unauthorized live tests, lock assets before publishing, OAuth by default
- Self-healing: Preflight health checks, auto-fix loops, error classification (FATAL vs RETRYABLE)

## Integrations

Direct (MCP): ClickUp, Gmail, Google Calendar, GitHub, Slack, Notion, Google Drive, GoHighLevel, Vercel, Composio (982+ tools)
GUI (Computer Use): Smartlead, Kit, DigitalOcean console, LinkedIn
SSH: DigitalOcean droplets (Autonomous SDR agents)
